name: Walnut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/3 pound Soft butter; half sweet and half salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly toast the walnuts in a low oven and let cool completely. Grind the walnuts in a food processor until finely chopped.
2. Cream the soft butter and sugar together until smooth. Add the ground walnuts, flour, and vanilla, mixing well to combine.
3. Using a plain piping tip, pipe small drops of the cookie dough onto a buttered baking sheet or parchment paper lined with parchment.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-30 minutes, or until lightly browned and set. Let cool completely on the baking sheet before transferring to a wire rack.
5. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the cooled cookies. Store in an airtight container. The cookie dough freezes well.
